items.title: First deal strikes ASUS’ Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme Zenbook A16 OLED Copilot+ PC with 48GB RAM at $1,550 (Save $350)
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy is offering ASUS’ latest Zenbook A16 Copilot+ PC with a Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme processor for $1,549.99 shipped. This is the first discount we’ve tracked on this particular laptop, and also the first deal we’ve seen on any Copilot+ PC powered by this new Qualcomm chip. The configuration on sale here packs 48GB of RAM and normally sells for $1,900, so today’s offer takes a straight $350 off. It’s one of the more notable Copilot+ PC deals currently available at Best Buy, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Judge pauses Paramount’s attempt to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
items.summary: A judge partially granted the request from a dozen state attorneys general to temporarily place the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery on hold, as reported by Variety and Reuters. US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín said that based on the new company's market share, "the Court is persuaded that it can presume […]

items.title: Apple’s iPhone Air MagSafe Battery just dropped back to best price ever at 40% off
items.summary: Just after seeing best price ever at a sizable 40% off.

items.title: ‘All I think about is her’: Families demand answers as Nigeria's boat disasters keep happening
items.summary: Hundreds of lives are lost each year in Nigeria as a result of boat accidents yet nothing seems to change.

items.title: LEGO’s 525-piece Star Wars microscale AT-AT walker with a Rebel snowspeeder is down at a $52 low at Amazon
items.summary:
LEGO Star Wars AT-AT Walker set

Buy for $52 (Reg. $65)

What we love

Whether you’re a lover of LEGO or a lover of Star Wars, this 525-piece set gives you a microscale build of the infamous AT-AT walker, as well as a Rebel Snowspeeder, as seen in The Empire Strikes Back. It will make a great addition to any collection or can stand out as décor on its own, standing only 6.5 inches high once completed.

items.title: Add up to an 8TB SATA SSD to your PC while Samsung’s 870 EVO drives are up to 52% off with rare deals
items.summary: We are now tracking a handful of solid deals on Samsung’s 870 EVO SATA SSDs at Amazon, and you can save up to 52% on them right now with deals from $249.9 shipped for the 1TB 870 EVO. That’s the lowest price we have tracked since it jumped up in price earlier this year to fetch as much as $520 in recent months. Not only is it the lowest price we have tracked for this drive, but it’s also matching the 512GB variant’s price right now, which is down from its $300 usual going rate. The 2TB variant of the Samsung 870 EVO is seeing the best deal right now at $399.99 shipped, which works out to a 41% discount. Head below for more details.

items.title: Need a spare pair of ANC earbuds? These Baseus buds won’t break the bank down at $23
items.summary:
Baseus Bass BP1 Pro ANC Earbuds

Buy for $23 (Reg. $40)

What we love

If you can’t justify spending well over a hundred dollars on a pair of ANC earbuds, you may want to scope out these affordable alternatives from Baseus. The brand touts these buds can reduce noise by “up to -50dB” and the cost is as low as $23 currently.

items.title: Tidy up those cords with 60 reusable cable ties down at $5.50 (Save 31%)
items.summary:
Lamicall 6-inch Reusable Cable Ties (60-pack)

Buy for $5.50 (Reg. $8)

What we love

Sometimes you don’t need cord cover, you need cable ties. Underneath or behind a desk is a perfect example of this, and this deal will bail you out of sixty situations with that many individual 6-inch ties in tow. They can be used over and over again, and the price works out to less than $0.10 each right now.

items.title: Now less – Grab five nylon Apple Watch bands for just $8.50
items.summary:
Adorve Soft Nylon Apple Watch Bands

Buy for $8.50 (Reg. $13)

What we love

The last time these bands dropped in price, they were $9 Prime shipped. That’s a great deal, by today’s offer takes things slightly further, delivering five stretchy nylon straps for $8.50. That’s only $1.70 per band, which is a bargain if you want some straps you can reach for when tackling projects, working out, and more.

items.title: Supplements up to 54% off: Save on creatine, sleep aids, probiotics, vitamins, and more
items.summary: Whether you’re looking to build muscle, improve sleep, support gut health, or simply fill a nutritional gap, supplements can add up fast. Right now, you can score up to 54% off a wide range of top-rated options from Amazon, making it a great time to stock up.

items.title: Bring home the Autel MaxiCharger Home level 2 50A smart AI-supported EV charger while down at $424 ($145 off)
items.summary: By way of its official Amazon storefront, Autel is offering the MaxiCharger Home Level 2 50A Smart EV Charger for $424 shipped in multiple colorways. This is a Prime-exclusive deal dropping the price down from its full $569 rate, which we’ve mostly seen discounts keeping at $469 or higher in 2026, though there have been some drops lower to $398, mostly in the form of Lightning deals and most recently during June’s Prime Day event. You’re getting the next-best price behind Prime Day here, with $145 cut from the tag. You can find some additional models, as well as the brand’s other car-focused devices, all within the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Slide this 20W USB-C power strip in your travel bag for $15 (Reg. $20)
items.summary:
ORICO 7-in-1 20W USB-C Travel Power Strip

Buy for $15 (Reg. $20)

What we love

Having a MagSafe charging station is certainly nice while traveling, but you still have to worry if the outlet is close enough when traveling. A strip like this can help with that and this unit wraps up nicely when not in use. It packs AC, USB-A, and Type-C outputs, making it a well rounded an affordable option worth considering.

items.summary: Nomad is one of our favorite Apple gear accessory makers and its biggest sale event of the year is now live. That said, the 2026 Anniversary Sale will shut down for another later tonight and you’ll want to get in there while you still can.
